text.title: Auto-Draft Postmortem, No Auto-Publish Worked Example
text.summary: One worked example end-to-end for inc-postmortem-auto-draft-no-publish — narrative trace plus the final artefact.

section.title: Narrative trace
section.p: Incident inc-2026-05-12 closed at T → agent pulls Slack+PD+dashboards → emits draft at T+90min with 5 evidence links, 3 factor candidates, 2 action placeholders, `published=false` → human reviews, accepts 2 factors, assigns owners, sets `published=true`.

section.title: Final artefact
